# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function adminReportDashboard(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

    $post = $_POST ?? [];

    $dateFrom = isset($post['date_from']) ? trim((string)$post['date_from']) : '';
    $dateTo   = isset($post['date_to']) ? trim((string)$post['date_to']) : '';

    $status   = $post['status']   ?? null;
    $category = $post['category'] ?? null;

    $groupBy  = isset($post['group_by']) ? trim((string)$post['group_by']) : 'day';
    $orderBy  = isset($post['order_by']) ? trim((string)$post['order_by']) : 'date_asc';

    $allowedGroupBy = [
        'day'      => "DATE(r.created_at)",
        'month'    => "DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-01')",
        'category' => "r.category",
        'status'   => "r.status",
    ];
    if (!isset($allowedGroupBy[$groupBy])) {
        $groupBy = 'day';
    }
    $groupExpr = $allowedGroupBy[$groupBy];

    $allowedOrderBy = [
        'date_asc'      => "bucket ASC",
        'date_desc'     => "bucket DESC",
        'count_desc'    => "total_count DESC",
        'count_asc'     => "total_count ASC",
        'amount_desc'   => "total_amount DESC",
        'amount_asc'    => "total_amount ASC",
        'category_asc'  => "bucket ASC",
        'category_desc' => "bucket DESC",
        'status_asc'    => "bucket ASC",
        'status_desc'   => "bucket DESC",
    ];
    if (!isset($allowedOrderBy[$orderBy])) {
        $orderBy = 'date_asc';
    }
    $orderExpr = $allowedOrderBy[$orderBy];

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    $dateFromSql = null;
    $dateToSql = null;

    if ($dateFrom !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateFrom) ?: DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d H:i:s', $dateFrom);
        if ($dt) {
            $dateFromSql = $dt->format('Y-m-d 00:00:00');
        }
    }
    if ($dateTo !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateTo) ?: DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d H:i:s', $dateTo);
        if ($dt) {
            $dateToSql = $dt->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        }
    }

    if ($dateFromSql !== null) {
        $where[] = "r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $dateFromSql;
    }
    if ($dateToSql !== null) {
        $where[] = "r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $dateToSql;
    }

    $normalizeList = static function ($value): array {
        if ($value === null) return [];
        if (is_array($value)) return array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', array_map('strval', $value)), static fn($v) => $v !== ''));
        $s = trim((string)$value);
        if ($s === '') return [];
        if (str_contains($s, ',')) {
            $parts = array_map('trim', explode(',', $s));
            return array_values(array_filter($parts, static fn($v) => $v !== ''));
        }
        return [$s];
    };

    $statusList = $normalizeList($status);
    $categoryList = $normalizeList($category);

    $addInClause = static function (string $field, array $values, string $paramPrefix, array &$where, array &$params): void {
        if (!$values) return;
        $placeholders = [];
        foreach ($values as $i => $v) {
            $k = ":" . $paramPrefix . "_" . $i;
            $placeholders[] = $k;
            $params[$k] = $v;
        }
        $where[] = $field . " IN (" . implode(',', $placeholders) . ")";
    };

    $addInClause("r.status", $statusList, "status", $where, $params);
    $addInClause("r.category", $categoryList, "category", $where, $params);

    if (isset($post['min_amount']) && $post['min_amount'] !== '') {
        $minAmount = filter_var($post['min_amount'], FILTER_VALIDATE_FLOAT);
        if ($minAmount !== false) {
            $where[] = "r.amount >= :min_amount";
            $params[':min_amount'] = $minAmount;
        }
    }
    if (isset($post['max_amount']) && $post['max_amount'] !== '') {
        $maxAmount = filter_var($post['max_amount'], FILTER_VALIDATE_FLOAT);
        if ($maxAmount !== false) {
            $where[] = "r.amount <= :max_amount";
            $params[':max_amount'] = $maxAmount;
        }
    }

    $whereSql = $where ? ("WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $where)) : "";

    $table = isset($post['table']) ? trim((string)$post['table']) : 'reports';
    $allowedTables = ['reports', 'orders', 'transactions'];
    if (!in_array($table, $allowedTables, true)) {
        $table = 'reports';
    }

    $sql = "
        SELECT
            {$groupExpr} AS bucket,
            COUNT(*) AS total_count,
            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
            COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
            COALESCE(MIN(r.amount), 0) AS min_amount,
            COALESCE(MAX(r.amount), 0) AS max_amount
        FROM {$table} r
        {$whereSql}
        GROUP BY bucket
        ORDER BY {$orderExpr}
    ";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        $type = PDO::PARAM_STR;
        if (is_int($v)) $type = PDO::PARAM_INT;
        elseif (is_float($v)) $type = PDO::PARAM_STR;
        $stmt->bindValue($k, $v, $type);
    }
    $stmt->execute();
    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $totalsSql = "
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_count,
            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
            COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount
        FROM {$table} r
        {$whereSql}
    ";
    $totalsStmt = $pdo->prepare($totalsSql);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        $type = PDO::PARAM_STR;
        if (is_int($v)) $type = PDO::PARAM_INT;
        elseif (is_float($v)) $type = PDO::PARAM_STR;
        $totalsStmt->bindValue($k, $v, $type);
    }
    $totalsStmt->execute();
    $totals = (array)$totalsStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return [
        'filters' => [
            'date_from' => $dateFromSql,
            'date_to' => $dateToSql,
            'status' => $statusList,
            'category' => $categoryList,
            'group_by' => $groupBy,
            'order_by' => $orderBy,
            'table' => $table,
        ],
        'totals' => [
            'total_count' => (int)($totals['total_count'] ?? 0),
            'total_amount' => (float)($totals['total_amount'] ?? 0),
            'avg_amount' => (float)($totals['avg_amount'] ?? 0),
        ],
        'rows' => $rows,
        'sql' => [
            'report' => $sql,
            'totals' => $totalsSql,
            'params' => $params,
        ],
    ];
}
